name: ropas
description: ERP SaaS multi-tenant para tienda de ropa, integrado con ENKI

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "pnpm --dir backend dev" "pnpm --dir frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir backend build && pnpm --dir frontend build
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir backend lint && pnpm --dir frontend lint
